<!-- agent-py-sidecar: auto-generated; do not delete this line to allow refresh -->
# backend/schemas/paperclip.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:37Z

## Purpose
Paperclip local context/artifact adapter schemas.

The project uses Paperclip as a local artifact/context-pack adapter. It is not an
external Paperclip framework integration. These schemas describe how callers add
small text artifacts, inspect them, and compose context packs for agent tasks.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `typing` import Any, Literal
- from `pydantic` import BaseModel, Field, field_validator

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `PaperclipCreateRequest`: Input model for creating a local Paperclip artifact.
- `PaperclipArtifactResponse`: Response model for a stored Paperclip artifact.
- `PaperclipArtifactDetail`: Detailed artifact response that includes stored content.
- `PaperclipContextPackRequest`: Input model for composing several artifacts into one context pack.
- `PaperclipContextPackResponse`: Composed context pack returned to agents or orchestration layers.
- `PaperclipStatusResponse`: Runtime status for the local Paperclip adapter.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above
